name: agenda-lifecycle
goal: Complete agenda lifecycle: daily-plan offers agenda creation, process-meetings archives agendas via frontmatter.

userStories.title: Daily-plan offers agenda creation
userStories.description: After listing meetings, identify prep-worthy ones and offer to create agendas inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect prep-worthy meetings by title patterns: QBR, customer, leadership, review, partner, 1:1, planning, standup, sync
Check existence: Skip if agenda already exists matching `now/agendas/YYYY-MM-DD-*{title-slug}*`
Offer prompt: 'Create agenda for [title]? [y/N]' — only for prep-worthy meetings without existing agendas
If yes, invoke prepare-meeting-agenda pattern with pre-filled context (date, title, attendees)
After agenda created, show link in meeting list: '→ [agenda](path)'
If all meetings have agendas or none are prep-worthy, skip the offer entirely

userStories.title: Archive agendas after processing
userStories.description: In process-meetings, check if meeting has linked agenda and mark it as processed.
acceptanceCriteria: If agenda file exists, add to agenda file frontmatter: `status: processed`, `processed_at: YYYY-MM-DD`
Handle missing agenda gracefully (file deleted/moved manually) — log warning, continue
Output: 'Archived N agendas' in process-meetings summary
No file movement — agenda stays in `now/agendas/`
If agenda already has `status: processed`, skip (idempotent)
